title: Tear down exact owned state
prompt: Remove every remaining runtime, callback, peer, pane, tab, and session owned by the `doctrine-test` flow, leave unrelated state untouched, and prove the final roster matches the pre-test baseline.
setup: Host retains exact inventory of test-owned ids and baseline roster.
expectedOutcome: All and only test-owned state is gone, with no active callbacks or duplicate runtimes.
cleanup: this scenario is the terminal cleanup

claude: cancel/kill exact objects and compare rosters
pi: callback_cancel, runtime_stop, pane_close, tab_kill, session_kill, then inventory
